name: Brosi1975-pi-for-everyone
description: One-command installer for a free, local AI assistant on Mac. No subscription, no cloud, no data shared. Built for people with no technical background. Built with https://github.com/badlogic/pi-mono and [Ollama](https://ollama.com).
